articles.title: New York Knicks win NBA championship for first time in over 50 years
articles.summary: The Knicks clinched the title against the San Antonio Spurs, 94-90, in the fifth game of the best-of-seven series.
articles.titleZh: 纽约尼克斯队 50 多年来首次夺得 NBA 总冠军
articles.summaryZh: 在七场四胜制系列赛的第五场比赛中，尼克斯队以 94-90 战胜圣安东尼奥马刺队，夺得冠军。

articles.title: Switzerland votes on plan to cap population at 10 million
articles.summary: The right-wing Swiss People's Party calls the plan a "sustainability initiative",  but opponents say it is a recipe for chaos.
articles.titleZh: 瑞士就人口限制在1000万的计划进行投票
articles.summaryZh: 右翼瑞士人民党称该计划为“可持续发展倡议”，但反对者称这会引发混乱。

articles.title: Trump says deal to end Iran war will be signed Sunday, as Iran disagrees on timing
articles.summary: Pakistan's prime minister, a key mediator in U.S.-Iran talks to end the war, said Saturday that a peace deal was closer "than ever before," and could be finalized "in the next 24 hours."
articles.titleZh: 特朗普称结束伊朗战争的协议将于周日签署，但伊朗在时间上存在分歧
articles.summaryZh: 巴基斯坦总理是美伊结束战争谈判的关键调解人，他周六表示，和平协议“比以往任何时候都更接近”，并且可能“在未来 24 小时内”敲定。

contentParagraphs.en: Residents swim and play in the waters of the Strait of Hormuz while cargo ships and commercial vessels lie anchored in the distance off Bandar Abbas, Iran, Wednesday, June 10, 2026.
contentParagraphs.zh: 2026 年 6 月 10 日星期三，居民在霍尔木兹海峡水域游泳和玩耍，而货船和商船则停泊在伊朗阿巴斯港远处。

contentParagraphs.en: Razieh Poudat/ISNA via AP
contentParagraphs.zh: Razieh Poudat/ISNA 图片来源：美联社

contentParagraphs.en: Razieh Poudat/ISNA via AP
contentParagraphs.zh: Razieh Poudat/ISNA 图片来源：美联社

contentParagraphs.en: Progress on a deal to end the Iran war appeared to mount on Saturday, with mediator Pakistan and the U.S. saying an agreement could be reached as soon as Sunday — although, Iran cast doubt on that timing.
contentParagraphs.zh: 周六，结束伊朗战争的协议似乎取得了进展，调解人巴基斯坦和美国表示最早可能在周日达成协议，不过伊朗对此时机表示怀疑。

contentParagraphs.en: President Trump, who has asserted many times throughout the war that the countries are on the verge of an agreement, said Saturday morning on Truth Social that a deal was "scheduled to get signed" Sunday and that the Strait of Hormuz — a key global oil and gas transport route — would open soon after.
contentParagraphs.zh: 特朗普总统在整个战争期间多次声称两国即将达成协议，他周六上午在《真相社会》上表示，协议“计划于周日签署”，并且霍尔木兹海峡——全球重要的石油和天然气运输路线——将在不久后开放。

contentParagraphs.en: Iran's foreign ministry spokesperson Esmail Baghaei, however, said he didn't think a finalized pact would happen so soon. Baghaei told Iranian state media Saturday: "It will not be tomorrow." But, he added: "The possibility of this happening in the coming days cannot be ruled out."
contentParagraphs.zh: 然而，伊朗外交部发言人Esmail Baghaei表示，他认为不会这么快达成最终协议。Baghaei周六告诉伊朗国家媒体： “这不会是明天。“但是，他补充说： ”不能排除未来几天发生这种情况的可能性。“

contentParagraphs.en: Pakistan also signaled progress.
contentParagraphs.zh: 巴基斯坦也标志着进步。

contentParagraphs.en: "We are closer to a peace deal than ever before," Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif said in an early morning post on X. A finalized peace deal was "likely expected in the next 24 hours," he said.
contentParagraphs.zh: “我们比以往任何时候都更接近和平协议，”巴基斯坦总理谢赫巴兹·谢里夫（ Shehbaz Sharif ）在X的清晨帖子中说。他说，最终的和平协议“可能在未来24小时内达成”。

contentParagraphs.en: Sharif said both sides would sign the deal electronically, once finalized, followed by technical-level talks next week.
contentParagraphs.zh: 谢里夫表示，一旦最终确定，双方将以电子方式签署协议，然后在下周进行技术层面的谈判。

contentParagraphs.en: "We are confident that this historic peace deal will form a strong foundation for lasting peace," Sharif said in his post.
contentParagraphs.zh: “我们相信，这一历史性的和平协议将为持久和平奠定坚实的基础，”谢里夫在岗位上说。

contentParagraphs.en: On Friday, Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said on X: "The Islamabad Memorandum of Understanding has never been closer."
contentParagraphs.zh: 周五，伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格奇（ Abbas Araghchi ）在X上表示： “伊斯兰堡谅解备忘录从未如此接近。”

contentParagraphs.en: Trump also said on Saturday that the deal would result in the elimination of Iran's enriched uranium stockpile that could be used in a nuclear weapon, a main sticking point in negotiations. But the exact details of the agreement are not yet clear.
contentParagraphs.zh: 特朗普周六还表示，该协议将导致消除伊朗可用于核武器的浓缩铀库存，这是谈判的一个主要症结。但协议的确切细节尚不清楚。

contentParagraphs.en: "At the appropriate time, when all is calm, we will go in and get the Nuclear Dust, buried deep under the powerful sunken granite mountains, thanks to our beautiful B-2 Bombers and their brilliant pilots, and downblend and destroy it, whether in Iran, or the United States," he wrote on social media.
contentParagraphs.zh: 他在社交媒体上写道： “在适当的时候，当一切都平静下来时，我们将进入并获得深埋在强大的沉没花岗岩山脉下的核粉尘，这要归功于我们美丽的B-2轰炸机及其出色的飞行员，并将其稀释并摧毁，无论是在伊朗还是在美国。”

contentParagraphs.en: Trump followed with a vague threat: "Hopefully, this process will all work out quickly, easily, and smoothly. If it doesn't, we have the ultimate alternative, hopefully never to be used again!"
contentParagraphs.zh: 特朗普随后发出了一个模糊的威胁： “希望这个过程能够快速，轻松，顺利地完成。如果没有，我们有最终的选择，希望永远不会再被使用！”

contentParagraphs.en: It's the latest example of Trump flip-flopping between promising peace and ramping up threats against Iran. On Thursday, the president said he had called off planned strikes on Iran due to "the fact that discussions with the Islamic Republic of Iran have been brought to the highest level of Iranian leadership and approved," Trump said on Truth Social.
contentParagraphs.zh: 这是特朗普在承诺和平和加剧对伊朗的威胁之间翻来覆去的最新例子。周四，总统表示，由于“与伊朗伊斯兰共和国的讨论已经达到伊朗领导层的最高水平并获得批准” ，他已取消对伊朗的计划罢工，特朗普在Truth Social上说。

contentParagraphs.en: The Group of Seven summit starts on Monday, where Trump is expected to discuss demining the Strait of Hormuz. A senior U.S. official, who briefed journalists on condition of anonymity under rules set by the White House, said Trump planned to meet on the G7 sidelines with the leaders of Egypt, Qatar and United Arab Emirates to discuss efforts to wind down the war.
contentParagraphs.zh: 七国集团峰会于周一开始，预计特朗普将讨论在霍尔木兹海峡排雷的问题。一位不愿透露姓名的美国高级官员表示，特朗普计划在七国集团会议期间与埃及、卡塔尔和阿拉伯联合酋长国领导人会面，讨论结束战争的努力。

contentParagraphs.en: G7 members Britain and France have expressed interest in assisting with demining once the conflict is paused. It was not clear how many mines are in the strait that Iran has effectively controlled since shortly after the war began, virtually shutting down oil and natural gas shipments from the Persian Gulf. The U.S. has blockaded Iranian ports in response.
contentParagraphs.zh: 七国集团成员英国和法国表示有兴趣在冲突暂停后协助排雷。目前尚不清楚自战争开始后不久，伊朗实际控制了海峡中的多少矿山，实际上关闭了来自波斯湾的石油和天然气运输。作为回应，美国封锁了伊朗港口。

contentParagraphs.en: "The Naval Blockade will remain in full force and effect until this Transaction is finalized — Time and place of the signing to be announced shortly," Trump wrote on social media Thursday.
contentParagraphs.zh: 特朗普周四在社交媒体上写道： “在这笔交易最终确定之前，海军封锁将继续完全有效—签署的时间和地点将很快宣布。”

contentParagraphs.en: A tenuous ceasefire has been in place since April 7.
contentParagraphs.zh: 自4月7日以来，已经实施了脆弱的停火。

contentParagraphs.en: NPR's Carrie Kahn contributed to this story.
contentParagraphs.zh: NPR的Carrie Kahn为这个故事做出了贡献。
